title: blank canvas
description: The skeleton of an optimized version of minecraft to which the user adds mods, while ensuring a smooth and lag-free experience.
body:
![A pixelated piece of clean fabric, a canvas, with a golden sparkle around the sides](data:image/png;base64, 'blank canvas icon')
## Performance
Embark on a Minecraft journey like never before with blank canvas, a modpack that strips away the excess, leaving you with a pristine and efficient foundation for an unparalleled gaming experience. This minimalistic modpack focuses on enhancing performance while keeping the vanilla visual appeal, ensuring that your Minecraft adventures are seamless and breathtaking.

<details>
<summary>Included Mods (9)</summary>

**Sodium by [jellysquid3](https://modrinth.com/user/jellysquid3):** Revolutionize your game's performance with Sodium, an ultra-efficient rendering engine that optimizes graphics processing, resulting in significantly improved frame rates and reduced lag.

**Indium by [comp500](https://modrinth.com/user/comp500)** Complementing Sodium, Indium further refines the rendering pipeline, offering additional optimizations for an even smoother gameplay experience. Enjoy enhanced graphics without sacrificing performance.

**Iris Shaders by [coderbot](https://modrinth.com/user/coderbot):** Immerse yourself in a visually stunning world with Iris Shaders, providing a beautiful and realistic lighting experience. Watch as the Minecraft landscape comes to life with dynamic lighting and shadows.

**Lithium by [jellysquid3](https://modrinth.com/user/jellysquid3):** Fine-tune your server's performance with Lithium, a mod designed to optimize server-side performance, reducing lag and ensuring a more responsive and enjoyable multiplayer experience.

**Exordium by [tr7zw](https://modrinth.com/user/tr7zw):** Improve overall performance by lowering the framerate the gui is rendered at, freeing up time for the GPU and CPU for more important tasks like rendering.

**Sodium Extra by [FlashyReese](https://modrinth.com/user/FlashyReese):** Elevate your visual experience with Sodium Extra, an extension to Sodium that introduces additional enhancements and features, pushing the boundaries of Minecraft's graphics capabilities.

**Reese's Sodium Options by [FlashyReese](https://modrinth.com/user/FlashyReese):** Customize your graphics settings with Reese's Sodium Options, giving you the power to tailor the visual aspects of the game to your liking. Tweak and adjust parameters to achieve the perfect balance between performance and aesthetics.

**Starlight by [spottedleaf](https://modrinth.com/user/spottedleaf):** Add a touch of magic to your Minecraft nights with Starlight, a mod that enhances celestial visuals and brings the night sky to life. Gaze upon the stars as they twinkle in the darkness, creating a truly enchanting atmosphere.

**Mod Menu by [Prospector](https://modrinth.com/user/Prospector):** Take control of your gaming experience with Mod Menu, a user-friendly interface that provides easy access to the mods within the pack. Configure settings, explore options, and manage your gameplay effortlessly.

</details>

## Compatibility

Mods like Sodium, Indium, and Lithium work together to ensure that as many mods as possible are compatible with this modpack. Sodium extra, Reese's Sodium Options, and Mod menu simplify control and add an extra level of customization to the game. Iris shaders makes the game compatible with Optifine resource packs and shaders, as well as optimizing performance with shaders, and starlight is a perfect mod with iris to completely rewrite the lighting engine to make it as fast as possible.

<details>
<summary>Notes</summary>

This modpack **does not** include any quality of life mods, and that's what makes it a blank canvas. **You** build upon the foundations provided to make it your own (or stick with vanilla like I usually do.) Some mods that I personally recommend to even further improve performance are [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/ModernFix) by [embeddedt](https://modrinth.com/user/embeddedt), [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) by [FX](https://modrinth.com/user/FX), and [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) by [RaphiMC](https://modrinth.com/user/RaphiMC)

</details>
